title: SenZee Plastic Jars with Lids 210ml 12 Pcs Clear Plastic Storage Jar with Screw Top Lid Small Spice Cake Jars Pots for Kitchen Cosmetics Containers
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL: Made of hardness food grade plastic, these plastic jars with lids are lightweight, sturdy, and have smooth edges, ensure a long time use.
AIRTIGHT SEALING: The plastic jar with lid is equipped with a screw tight lid and a foam gasket, which can form an airtight seal to stop leaks.
COMPACT SIZE: These plastic storage jars with screw top lids measure 6.5 x 8 cm, compact and lightweight, with a capacity of 210ml sufficient for various daily storage needs.
WIDE APPLICATION: The plastic jar with lid transparent can be used to store various items such as spices, cakes, sweet, nuts, snacks, homemade cosmetics, lotion, etc.
TRANSPARENT DESIGN: The transparent body of the plastic cake jars with lids clearly displays its contents, making it easy for you to quickly distinguish and select.
description: plastic jars with lids 210ml 12 pcs clear plastic storage jar with screw top lid small spice cake jars pots for kitchen cosmetics containers Plastic Jars with Lids Features: Package content: You will receive 12 pack plastic spice jars with lids, measuring 2.56 x 3.15 inches/6.5 x 8 cm with a capacity of 210ml, sufficient to meet your various daily storage needs. Easy storage: The cylindrical body of the plastic pots with lids is easy to stack, making it convenient for you to organize on any cabinet, spice rack, or pantry shelf. Various occasions: Slime containers can be used to store various contents and are widely used in home kitchens, offices, restaurants, cake shops, coffee shops, and more. Specifications: Material: plastic Size: 210ml Color: transparent Weight: 250g Package includes: Plastic Jars with Lids x 12 pack

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash with warm, soapy water. Avoid harsh detergents or abrasive materials. Do not use in microwave, oven, or dishwasher. Allow to air dry completely to maintain airtight seal.
